query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, p.client_id, c.name as client_name, c.email as client_email, u.id as user_id, u.email as user_email
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON c.email = u.email
WHERE p.name = 'Prueba 1';
